name: creator-adda-mobile
description: Mobile app wrapper for Creator Adda website using Capacitor

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
